# Coach Agreement (template — v0, requires counsel review before any signature)

Referenced by RISK_REGISTER §4/§18. Every member holding Coach or Mentor role
signs this before leading any cohort, office hour, or replay review.

---

As a TradeGame coach, I agree:

1. **Scope.** I coach **process only**: risk management, position sizing,
   journaling, scenario debriefs, platform mechanics. I do not tell anyone what
   to buy, sell, hold, enter, or exit — for any instrument, in any market, in
   any channel, call, or DM. "Should I trade X?" gets the same answer every
   time: *"That's your decision — let's look at your process."*
2. **No compensation.** I accept no payment, tip, donation, subscription,
   token, or gift from any member for coaching — no Venmo/CashApp/Patreon/
   crypto, no exceptions. Violations end my coach role immediately.
   (Why: compensation makes me — and the org — look like an unregistered
   investment adviser. This is the single fastest way to hurt the community.)
3. **No DMs first.** I never DM a member first about trading. I report
   impersonators to #scam-reports.
4. **Disclosure.** I disclose any relationship (paid, token-granted, affiliate)
   with any trading product, bot, token project, or broker before mentioning it,
   and I never promote them in coaching spaces.
4a. **No sim-to-real referrals (RISK_REGISTER §16a).** In org channels I never
   refer, recommend, or link members to any real-money broker, exchange,
   trading platform, prop-firm/funded-account program, or copy-trading
   service — compensated or not. Critical/educational discussion of platforms
   is fine; pointing someone at an account-opening path is not.
5. **Voice rules.** Cohort calls and office hours follow the voice-surface
   protocol (RISK_REGISTER §24): recorded or two-staff-present; AMA questions
   pre-screened.
6. **Minors.** If I believe a member is under 18, I redirect them away from
   leveraged-product discussion and flag a moderator.
7. **Supervision.** I accept spot-checks of my cohort content and will
   surrender the role if asked, no appeal needed. The org may revise this
   agreement; continued coaching = acceptance.

Signature: _________________  Discord handle: _________________  Date: _______
